G

GameLoop - Class in javashooter.gameutils
Main class starting any game, contains main().
GameLoop() - Constructor for class javashooter.gameutils.GameLoop
 
GameObject - Class in javashooter.gameobjects
The class GameObject represents an object appearing in a level of the game described by an instance of the class Playground.
GameObject(String, Playground, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
primary constructor.
GameObject(String, Playground, ObjectController, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
convenience constructor.

auto-generates javashooter.collider according to box width/height
